pokemon.name: Porygon
pokemon.description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

models.profile: SymPy is not an LLM but a pure-Python computer-algebra library that deterministically manipulates symbols to emit template proofs. Porygon, the first wholly artificial Pokémon made entirely of programming code, mirrors this engineered, code-native, rule-driven artifact.
